//: Realtime Database security rules for The Lit's live 'Exploring now' presence
counter (lit/analytics/). Presence data is ephemeral and holds NO private
data: /presence/<uid>/<connectionId> = true, one child per open tab, grouped
by the visitor's (anonymous) auth uid so the analytics page counts DISTINCT
visitors, not tabs. onDisconnect() removes each child the moment its tab
closes. Deploy with:  firebase deploy --only database   (or paste into the
Firebase console -> Realtime Database -> Rules -> Publish). See
Everything else stays locked down: only /presence is readable/writable, a
visitor may only write under their OWN uid, and node values must be the
